subject: Ledian, a red and black ladybug-like Pokemon, flying against a starry night garden background with large white flowers
description: A red and black insect-like Pokemon with white round markings on its wing covers hovers in mid-flight. It has four visible arms/legs outstretched and a pair of rounded wings are suggested. The figure is viewed from a slight front angle. The background is a rich deep teal-blue night sky dotted with sparkles or stars. Large white daisy-like flowers and green foliage frame the composition at the upper right and around the edges. Small light particles or sparkles scatter across the background, evoking the flavor text's description of the creature sprinkling glittering dust. The art style is painterly and luminous.
foreground: Ledian hovering with arms and wings extended, facing forward
background: Deep teal-blue night sky with sparkle particles; large white flowers and green foliage
emotion: Calm, radiant energy; magical and gentle presence
